sent_simp: 他们住的是一家五星级酒店。
sent_trad: 他們住的是一家五星級酒店。
pinyin: Tāmen zhù de shì yī jiā wǔ xīng jí jiǔdiàn.
english: They stayed at a five-star hotel.

sent_simp: 这两条路在这里交叉。
sent_trad: 這兩條路在這裡交叉。
pinyin: Zhè liǎng tiáo lù zài zhèlǐ jiāo chā.
english: These two roads intersect here.

sent_simp: 交警站在路口指挥交通。
sent_trad: 交警站在路口指揮交通。
pinyin: Jiāo jǐng zhàn zài lùkǒu zhǐhuī jiāotōng.
english: The traffic police officer stood at the intersection directing traffic.

sent_simp: 他不太擅长交际，不喜欢聚会。
sent_trad: 他不太擅長交際，不喜歡聚會。
pinyin: Tā bù tài shàncháng jiāo jì, bù xǐhuān jùhuì.
english: He's not great at socializing and doesn't like parties.

sent_simp: 今年工厂的产量比去年高了很多。
sent_trad: 今年工廠的產量比去年高了很多。
pinyin: Jīnnián gōngchǎng de chǎn liàng bǐ qùnián gāo le hěn duō.
english: This year the factory's output is much higher than last year.

sent_simp: 所有员工都享有带薪年假。
sent_trad: 所有員工都享有帶薪年假。
pinyin: Suǒyǒu yuángōng dōu xiǎng yǒu dài xīn niánjià.
english: All employees enjoy paid annual leave.

sent_simp: 婚礼上来了很多亲友。
sent_trad: 婚禮上來了很多親友。
pinyin: Hūnlǐ shàng lái le hěn duō qīn yǒu.
english: Many friends and relatives came to the wedding.

sent_simp: 这次旅行人均花了两千元。
sent_trad: 這次旅行人均花了兩千元。
pinyin: Zhè cì lǚxíng rén jūn huā le liǎng qiān yuán.
english: This trip cost two thousand yuan per person on average.

sent_simp: 人工智能正在改变很多行业。
sent_trad: 人工智能正在改變很多行業。
pinyin: Rén gōng zhì néng zhèngzài gǎibiàn hěn duō hángyè.
english: Artificial intelligence is transforming many industries.

sent_simp: 搬家以后，他仍旧每天骑车上班。
sent_trad: 搬家以後，他仍舊每天騎車上班。
pinyin: Bānjiā yǐhòu, tā réng jiù měitiān qí chē shàngbān.
english: Even after moving, he still bikes to work every day.

sent_simp: 一个商业代表团下周来访。
sent_trad: 一個商業代表團下週來訪。
pinyin: Yī gè shāngyè dài biǎo tuán xià zhōu lái fǎng.
english: A business delegation is visiting next week.

sent_simp: 出门带把伞，以免下雨。
sent_trad: 出門帶把傘，以免下雨。
pinyin: Chūmén dài bǎ sǎn, yǐ miǎn xià yǔ.
english: Take an umbrella when you go out so you don't get caught in the rain.

sent_simp: 他连续熬夜，以致生病了。
sent_trad: 他連續熬夜，以致生病了。
pinyin: Tā liánxù áoyè, yǐ zhì shēngbìng le.
english: He stayed up late night after night, to the point where he got sick.

sent_simp: 他仪表整洁，给人留下好印象。
sent_trad: 他儀表整潔，給人留下好印象。
pinyin: Tā yí biǎo zhěngjié, gěi rén liúxià hǎo yìnxiàng.
english: His neat appearance left a good impression on everyone.

sent_simp: 双方同意通过仲裁解决纠纷。
sent_trad: 雙方同意通過仲裁解決糾紛。
pinyin: Shuāngfāng tóngyì tōngguò zhòng cái jiějué jiūfēn.
english: Both sides agreed to resolve the dispute through arbitration.

sent_simp: 我们需要优化这个流程以节省时间。
sent_trad: 我們需要優化這個流程以節省時間。
pinyin: Wǒmen xūyào yōu huà zhège liúchéng yǐ jiéshěng shíjiān.
english: We need to optimize this process to save time.

sent_simp: 他在一家传媒公司做编辑。
sent_trad: 他在一家傳媒公司做編輯。
pinyin: Tā zài yī jiā chuán méi gōngsī zuò biānjí.
english: He works as an editor at a media company.

sent_simp: 我先估算一下装修要花多少钱。
sent_trad: 我先估算一下裝修要花多少錢。
pinyin: Wǒ xiān gū suàn yīxià zhuāngxiū yào huā duōshao qián.
english: Let me first estimate how much the renovation will cost.

sent_simp: 她唱歌时朋友用吉他伴奏。
sent_trad: 她唱歌時朋友用吉他伴奏。
pinyin: Tā chànggē shí péngyou yòng jítā bàn zòu.
english: Her friend accompanied her on guitar while she sang.

sent_simp: 这家店经常以低价出售库存商品。
sent_trad: 這家店經常以低價出售庫存商品。
pinyin: Zhè jiā diàn jīngcháng yǐ dī jià chūshòu kùcún shāngpǐn.
english: This shop often sells inventory items at low prices.

sent_simp: 低温天气要注意给孩子保暖。
sent_trad: 低溫天氣要注意給孩子保暖。
pinyin: Dī wēn tiānqì yào zhùyì gěi háizi bǎonuǎn.
english: In cold weather, make sure to keep your children warm.

sent_simp: 他很低调，从不炫耀自己的成就。
sent_trad: 他很低調，從不炫耀自己的成就。
pinyin: Tā hěn dī diào, cóng bù xuànyào zìjǐ de chéngjiù.
english: He's very low-key and never shows off his achievements.

sent_simp: 这栋楼共有五十户住户。
sent_trad: 這棟樓共有五十戶住戶。
pinyin: Zhè dòng lóu gòng yǒu wǔshí hù zhù hù.
english: This building has a total of fifty households.

sent_simp: 他努力存钱是为了买住房。
sent_trad: 他努力存錢是為了買住房。
pinyin: Tā nǔlì cún qián shì wèile mǎi zhù fáng.
english: He's been saving hard in order to buy housing.

sent_simp: 公司每年为员工安排一次体检。
sent_trad: 公司每年為員工安排一次體檢。
pinyin: Gōngsī měi nián wèi yuángōng ānpái yī cì tǐ jiǎn.
english: The company arranges an annual physical checkup for employees.

sent_simp: 超市每天供应新鲜蔬菜和水果。
sent_trad: 超市每天供應新鮮蔬菜和水果。
pinyin: Chāoshì měitiān gōng yìng xīnxiān shūcài hé shuǐguǒ.
english: The supermarket supplies fresh vegetables and fruit every day.

sent_simp: 这个项目依托大学的研究资源发展。
sent_trad: 這個項目依託大學的研究資源發展。
pinyin: Zhège xiàngmù yī tuō dàxué de yánjiū zīyuán fāzhǎn.
english: This project relies on the university's research resources to develop.

sent_simp: 同学们依次上台领取毕业证书。
sent_trad: 同學們依次上臺領取畢業證書。
pinyin: Tóngxuémen yī cì shàngtái lǐngqǔ bìyè zhèngshū.
english: The students went up one by one to receive their diplomas.

sent_simp: 违规行为将依法受到处罚。
sent_trad: 違規行為將依法受到處罰。
pinyin: Wéiguī xíngwéi jiāng yī fǎ shòudào chǔfá.
english: Violations will be penalized according to the law.

sent_simp: 这门课侧重培养学生的实际操作能力。
sent_trad: 這門課側重培養學生的實際操作能力。
pinyin: Zhè mén kè cè zhòng péiyǎng xuésheng de shíjì cāozuò nénglì.
english: This course places particular emphasis on developing students' hands-on skills.

sent_simp: 未经授权使用他人作品属于侵权行为。
sent_trad: 未經授權使用他人作品屬於侵權行為。
pinyin: Wèi jīng shòuquán shǐyòng tārén zuòpǐn shǔyú qīn quán xíngwéi.
english: Using someone else's work without permission constitutes infringement.

sent_simp: 文件按日期排列，便于查找。
sent_trad: 文件按日期排列，便於查找。
pinyin: Wénjiàn àn rìqī páiliè, biàn yú cházhǎo.
english: The files are arranged by date, making them easy to find.

sent_simp: 手机支付让购物变得更便捷了。
sent_trad: 手機支付讓購物變得更便捷了。
pinyin: Shǒujī zhīfù ràng gòuwù biàn de gèng biàn jié le.
english: Mobile payment has made shopping much more convenient and fast.

sent_simp: 超市这周在促销进口水果。
sent_trad: 超市這週在促銷進口水果。
pinyin: Chāoshì zhè zhōu zài cù xiāo jìnkǒu shuǐguǒ.
english: The supermarket is running a promotion on imported fruit this week.

sent_simp: 你把文件放进信箱里就行了。
sent_trad: 你把文件放進信箱裡就行了。
pinyin: Nǐ bǎ wénjiàn fàngjìn xìn xiāng lǐ jiù xíng le.
english: Just put the document in the mailbox.

sent_simp: 银行收紧了信贷条件。
sent_trad: 銀行收緊了信貸條件。
pinyin: Yínháng shōujǐn le xìn dài tiáojiàn.
english: The bank has tightened its credit conditions.

sent_simp: 合同已经修订好了，请再看一遍。
sent_trad: 合同已經修訂好了，請再看一遍。
pinyin: Hétong yǐjīng xiū dìng hǎo le, qǐng zài kàn yī biàn.
english: The contract has been revised; please read it through once more.

sent_simp: 今天真倒霉，钥匙忘在家里了。
sent_trad: 今天真倒霉，鑰匙忘在家裡了。
pinyin: Jīntiān zhēn dǎo méi, yàoshi wàng zài jiālǐ le.
english: What bad luck today — I left my keys at home.

sent_simp: 假定他明天不来，我们怎么办？
sent_trad: 假定他明天不來，我們怎麼辦？
pinyin: Jiǎ dìng tā míngtiān bù lái, wǒmen zěnme bàn?
english: Supposing he doesn't come tomorrow, what do we do?

sent_simp: 他辞职以后开始自己做生意。
sent_trad: 他辭職以後開始自己做生意。
pinyin: Tā cízhí yǐhòu kāishǐ zìjǐ zuò shēng yì.
english: After quitting his job, he started doing business on his own.
